metadata.title: Generate Leads | RealtorBoss
metadata.description: Generate social posts and run ads to bring new leads into RealtorBoss.

landing.title: Generate Leads
landing.subtitle: Draft social posts in seconds, then share to Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, or X.

quick_post.title: Quick Post
quick_post.body: Tap to draft a social post about a listing or open house. AI writes it, you share it — Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X.

ads.title: Run Ads
ads.body: Launch a Meta Lead Ad campaign — your leads land directly in the CRM tagged with the source campaign.
ads.billing_note: Meta ad billing stays with you · Google Ads in Phase 3

suggestions.heading: Suggested this week
suggestions.hint: Click a card to open the wizard pre-filled with this subject.

landing.roadmap_footer: Phase 1: Quick Post (today). Phase 2 (in ~4 weeks): direct Meta posting + Meta Lead Ads. Phase 3: Google Ads + cross-platform optimizer.

metadata.title: Connect Platforms | RealtorBoss
metadata.description: Connect your Facebook Pages, Instagram Business accounts, and LinkedIn profile so Generate Leads can publish directly.

connect.title: Connect platforms
connect.subtitle: Connect your social accounts so Generate Leads can publish posts directly.

metadata.title: Scheduled Posts | RealtorBoss
metadata.description: Queue of social posts waiting to publish, plus recent results.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Posts
scheduled.subtitle: Posts queued to publish later, plus recent results.

metadata.title: Recurring Posts | RealtorBoss
metadata.description: Manage your daily and weekly recurring social posts.

recurring.title: Recurring posts
recurring.subtitle: Daily and weekly templates the cron materializes into scheduled posts automatically.

metadata.title: Lead Ad Campaigns | RealtorBoss
metadata.description: Manage your Meta Lead Ad campaigns — pause / resume, refresh metrics, view captured leads.

ads.title: Lead Ad Campaigns
ads.subtitle: Your Meta Lead Ad history. Pause, resume, or refresh metrics on any active campaign.
